x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Payer Account
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Account of the individual or business that is liable to pay tax.
Used to debit or credit tax amounts resulting from transactions (e.g., withholding tax on interest, VAT on payments).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Recipient Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account owned by the government/tax authority where tax payments are finally transferred.
